measurement_context.method: POST /login on integrated PQC web-app auth service
measurement_context.measurement_method: len(token.encode('utf-8')) for bytes and len(token) for characters

extraction_note: PQC values were taken from research_evidence_missing/raw/pqc_token_live_samples.json. The RS256 reference value was taken from web-app-rsa/benchmark_results_rsa/summary.json.
